zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hugford於1387年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德萊頓時，她的父親Sir William Hugford42歲，母親Margery de Pabenham38歲。她於大約1402年與Sir Thomas Lucy在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾哈爾可特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1476年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾索利爾享年89歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hugford于1387年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾米德萊頓时，她的父亲Sir William Hugford42岁，母亲Margery de Pabenham38岁。她于大约1402年与Sir Thomas Lucy在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾哈爾可特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1476年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾索利爾享年89岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Hugford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Mogford
meanings: English: habitational name from Mogworthy in Rackenford (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Mogga + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hugford was born in 1387, in Middleton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Hugford, was 42 and her mother, Margery de Pabenham, was 38. She married Sir Thomas Lucy about 1402, in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1476, in Solihull, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Hugford est née en 1387, à Middleton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Hugford, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margery de Pabenham, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Lucy environ 1402, à Charlecote, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1476, à Solihull, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Hugford 1387 in Middleton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Hugford 42 und ihre Mutter Margery de Pabenham 38. Sie hat um 1402 in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Solihull, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Hugford è nata il nel 1387 nel Middleton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Hugford, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margery de Pabenham, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Lucy circa 1402, nel Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1476, nel Solihull, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hugfordが1387年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Hugfordは42歳，母Margery de Pabenhamは38歳であった。約1402年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチャーレコトでSir Thomas Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1476年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアソリハルで89歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hugford(이)가 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Hugford(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Pabenham(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 찰렉트에서 Sir Thomas Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 솔이훌에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Hugford nasceu em 1387, em Middleton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Hugford, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Pabenham, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Lucy aproximadamente 1402, em Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1476, em Solihull, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hugford родилась в 1387 г. в местности миддлетон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Hugford было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margery de Pabenham, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Lucy около 1402 г. в местности чарлекот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1476 г. в местности солихулл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Hugford nació en 1387, en Middleton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Hugford, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margery de Pabenham, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Lucy aproximadamente 1402, en Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1476, en Solihull, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
